challenge.title: Korak 7
challenge.description:
Sada, nakon dodavanja napiwaka/troška za napitak, imate konačan iznos za celu grupu. Morate odlučiti koliko svaki član mora da plati tako što ćete celokupni račun podeliti sa brojem ljudi.

U Python, koristiš znak kvačice / za deljenje. Primer:

half = 10 / 2

Kreiraj parametar nazvan final_bill i postavi mu vrednost rezultata deljenja running_total sa num_of_friends.

Na kraju, koristi funkciju print() da prikaže sekvencu znakova Bill per person: praćen razmakom i vrednošću final_bill.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tip = running_total * 0.25
print('Tip amount:', tip)

running_total += tip
print('Total with tip:', running_total)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš operator / za podelu running_total po num_of_friends i postavljanje rezultata u tvoju varijablu final_bill.
Treba da odštampate sekvencu karaktera Bill per person: praćenu razmakom i kriterijumom final_bill.
tests.testString:
({
    test: () => runPython(`
import io, contextlib, re

buffer = io.StringIO()
with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
    exec(_code)

match = re.search(r"Bill per person: ([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)", buffer.getvalue())

assert match
assert abs(float(match.group(1)) - (((37.89 + 57.34 + 39.39 + 64.21) * 1.25) / 4)) < 1e-6
`)
})

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tip = running_total * 0.25
print('Tip amount:', tip)

running_total += tip
print('Total with tip:', running_total)

final_bill = running_total / num_of_friends
print('Bill per person:', final_bill)

each_pays = round(final_bill, 2)
print('Each person pays:', each_pays)
